message:
fix(app): add retry_on_db_lock to send_message, request_contact, respond_contact

These three high-traffic MCP tools were missing the retry decorator that
protects against transient SQLite BUSY/locked errors under concurrent
access.  macro_contact_handshake already had the decorator; this brings
the other write-heavy endpoints to parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5790,6 +5790,7 @@ async def expire_window(
         project_arg="project_key",
         agent_arg="sender_name",
     )
+    @retry_on_db_lock(max_retries=3, base_delay=0.05, max_delay=0.5)
     async def send_message(
         ctx: Context,
         project_key: str,
@@ -7102,6 +7103,7 @@ async def _route(name_list: list[str], kind: str) -> None:
         project_arg="project_key",
         agent_arg="from_agent",
     )
+    @retry_on_db_lock(max_retries=3, base_delay=0.05, max_delay=0.5)
     async def request_contact(
         ctx: Context,
         project_key: str,
@@ -7273,6 +7275,7 @@ async def request_contact(
         project_arg="project_key",
         agent_arg="to_agent",
     )
+    @retry_on_db_lock(max_retries=3, base_delay=0.05, max_delay=0.5)
     async def respond_contact(
         ctx: Context,
         project_key: str,
